/usr/bin/ar qc libocturn_core.a CMakeFiles/octurn_core.dir/node/Node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/octurn_core.dir/parser/Parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/octurn_core.dir/lexer/Lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/octurn_core.dir/interpreter/Interpretator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/octurn_core.dir/utils/Utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/octurn_core.dir/log/logHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/octurn_core.dir/TA/taLib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/octurn_core.dir/mappers/maps.cpp.o CMakeFiles/octurn_core.dir/config/cfgTemp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/octurn_core.dir/src/polygon/polygonClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/octurn_core.dir/src/polygon/polygonDataFeed.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocturn_core.a
